data.title: Amazon's Jeff Bezos Weighs in on Next James Bond — Fans Agree on a Clear Favorite
data.description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has taken over creative control of the James Bond franchise, with his streaming service now in charge of the legendary British spy series.

data.title: Alibaba, Super Micro Computer And XPeng Are Among Top 10 Large Cap Gainers Last Week (Feb 17-Feb 21): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
data.description: Top performing large-cap stocks in the last week: Unity, Super Micro Computer, Alibaba, FTAI Aviation, STMicroelectronics, XPeng, Analog Devices, BeiGene, Tencent Music, Microchip Technology.

data.title: Elon Musk Demands Federal Workers Justify Their Jobs — FBI's Kash Patel Tells Employees Not To Respond
data.description: Elon Musk is demanding that federal employees justify their positions to him through email or lose their jobs.
